Minimal Yet Stylish: These candleholders decor are ideal for completing various decorative styles. They fancy enough as a part of the centrepiece to add a modern, rustic, boho or vintage touch to your dining table, and simultaneously highlight the elegant simplicity of all types and colours of taper candles, adding a welcoming ambiance to tables

Value Meets Beauty: These small glass candlesticks are not only basic taper candle holders for formal dinners but also aesthetic decorative candle holders glass for casual use daily. They shall instantly brighten up your dinner tables, fireplace mantle, living room, bathroom, and they are holiday dinner candle holder for Christmas, Halloween, Advent, Thanksgiving, and further make great gifts or adorable favours for weddings, birthday party, baby showers and anniversary
